## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test update
- [ ] CI/workflow update

## Validation

- [ ] Tests added or updated where relevant
- [ ] Local tests run for changed behavior
- [ ] Lint passes

## Accessibility Checklist

Complete this section for any user-facing UI change.

- [ ] Keyboard navigation works end-to-end
- [ ] Focus states are visible and focus order is logical
- [ ] Forms have associated labels and errors are announced
- [ ] Color is not the only indicator for state or meaning
- [ ] Reduced motion is respected (if animations were added)
- [ ] Screen reader behavior was checked at least once

## Screenshots or Recordings (If UI Changed)

Include before and after visuals when useful.

## Notes for Reviewers

List any risks, tradeoffs, or follow-up work.
